message:
feat(runtime): add galaxy-brain transparency layer with 4-level progressive disclosure

Implement bd-xox.5: decision transparency with progressive disclosure levels:
- L0 (TrafficLight): green/yellow/red confidence indicator
- L1 (PlainEnglish): one-sentence human-readable explanation
- L2 (EvidenceTerms): Bayes factors with support/oppose/neutral direction
- L3 (FullBayesian): full posterior, confidence intervals, expected loss

Integrates with existing DecisionCore/Decision types. Each level includes
all lower-level information. Display impl formats for terminal output.
12 unit tests covering all levels, traffic light classification, cycling,
and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
